sentence: This Kids Privacy Policy is designated to provide you, the legal guardian of a child 4+ ages, with guidance regarding our privacy policies and principles. By using this app you accept to all of this privacy policy terms. You should know that we can change this policy in any time.
We do not collect any personal information from Kids, Some information may nonetheless be collected through and maintained by Our App’s third party providers.
You, as the legal guardian of a Kid, can see a full list of such Third Parties.
- The Full list of Third Parties: 1- Firebase Database
- The Full list of Third Parties: 2- Firebase Cloud Messaging
